name: Origami
long_description:
Find & connect with your perfect leads by prompting in Origami.

origami.chat has 100+ data sources - use it to find more of your perfect customers, enrich a CSV, or launch a sequence to connect with decision makers.

Try it out and start connecting with your perfect leads in minutes, start free → origami.chat

Used by sales teams at CBRE, Clipboard Health, Remote.com, and more.
one_liner: Find your perfect leads with one prompt
